timing.total_wall_time_note: Sum of phases with both started_at and ended_at (research+prd+tasks). Implementation phase started 2026-04-16T02:00:00Z but ended_at was never recorded; later phases (testing/review/merge/documentation) shipped without timing instrumentation. 120 is the floor, not the actual wall time.

research.notes: SoC hardware detection feasibility, 3 approaches evaluated

prd.notes: 9-section brainstorm: Layers 0-4, Composite Optimizer, v6.0 Integration, Validation Plan

tasks.notes: 9-task implementation plan written via writing-plans skill

task_list.name: Static Chip Profiles
task_list.note: Static chip profiles shipped retroactively in commit 7478a8e (2026-04-20) as .claude/shared/chip-profiles.json with 17 profiles across 6 vendors (Apple A + M series, Google Tensor, Qualcomm Snapdragon, Samsung Exynos, MediaTek Dimensity, + 3 unknown/fallback). Schema is dispatch-oriented (compute_budget, dispatch_hints, thermal_profile, memory_constraints, composite_baseline). Grounded hardware metadata (cores, GPU, bandwidth, TDP, year, typical devices) deferred to future v1.1 if needed by downstream tasks. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 subagent dispatch reproduced F9 and surfaced the out-of-sync state.

task_list.name: Cloud Hardware Signature Table
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit 0a6896b, part of PR #82 chain). Cloud hardware signature table with 7 classes (NVIDIA H100/A100, Google TPU v5e/v4, AWS Trainium2, AMD MI300X, CPU fallback) at .claude/shared/hadf/hardware-signature-table.json. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

task_list.name: Chip Affinity Map Structure
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit c2e7fd7, part of PR #82 chain). Empty Chip Affinity Map with learning config at .claude/shared/chip-affinity-map.json — Layer 4 placeholder ready for runtime population. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

task_list.name: HADF Metrics Template + README
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit 75615a2, part of PR #82 chain). HADF metrics template + agent README at .claude/shared/hadf/hadf-metrics-template.json + .claude/shared/hadf/README.md. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

task_list.name: Dispatch Intelligence Integration
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit 13401d9, part of PR #82 chain). Dispatch intelligence integration — hardware_context, confidence gate, weight presets, adaptation config merged into .claude/shared/dispatch-intelligence.json. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

task_list.name: Extend cache-metrics + token-budget
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit c414140, part of PR #82 chain). Extended cache-metrics.json with hadf_affinity field, added hadf layer to token-budget. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

task_list.name: Reference Implementations
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit a923c07, part of PR #82 chain). Reference implementations (pseudocode) — Layer 0 device detection (Swift/Kotlin), Layer 2 Python classifier, Layer 3 adaptation, Composite helper. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

task_list.name: Token Budget Counter Update
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit 6fa8ca6, part of PR #82 chain). Token counter update + final validation. Part of the PR #82 close-out chain. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

task_list.name: Final Validation
task_list.note: Shipped in main (commit a5faa4f, part of PR #82 chain). Final validation + case study (hadf-hardware-aware-dispatch-case-study.md) + evolution v7.0 documentation + architecture one-pager + README + backlog update. State reconciled 2026-04-20 after HADF T1 reconcile exposed the same out-of-sync pattern across T2-T9.

transitions.note: T1 marked completed (artifact was shipped 2026-04-20 in commit 7478a8e but state.json was never reconciled). tasks.completed: 0 -> 1. Subagent dispatch for T1 reproduced F9 in practice — evidence for upstream ticket #51289.

Full HADF T2–T9 reconcile. All 9 tasks' artifacts had been shipped in PR #82 (2026-04-16 → 2026-04-17) but state.json was never updated — the feature sat at phase=implementation / 1 of 9 completed for 3-4 days until today's reconciliation. Case study (hadf-hardware-aware-dispatch-case-study.md) already exists and is linked at top-level case_study + case_study_showcase fields. Feature transitioning implementation → complete at actual delivery truth.
